case_title: CAROLYN LOWE VS. OXYGEN PUBLIC RELATIONS, LLC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-06-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-06-2018 BY PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU . PLAINTIFF CAROLYN LOWE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT OXYGEN PUBLIC RELATIONS, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY LEBLANC EDDIE, CEO. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-06-2018 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION RE REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOWE, CAROLYN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-26-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT OXYGEN PUBLIC RELATIONS, LLC.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOWE, CAROLYN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OXYGEN PUBLIC RELATIONS, LLC. JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LOWE, CAROLYN AS TO DEFENDANT OXYGEN PUBLIC RELATIONS, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-06-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOWE, CAROLYN
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY LOWE, CAROLYN OXYGEN PUBLIC RELATIONS, LLC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
INVALID/RETURNED CHECK FOR TRANSACTION W0518329S010 FOR SMALL CLAIMS > 5000
INVALID/RETURNED CHECK REDEEMED FOR TRANSACTION W0518329S010 FOR SMALL CLAIMS > 5000

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-06-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-06-2018 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF CAROLYN LOWE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE AS AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS WAS NOT SERVED. HONORABLE CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS VERBALLY GRANTED THE PLAINTIFF TO BE ALLOWED A TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE FOR THE NEXT HEARING DATE. HOWEVER, PLAINTIFF IS STILL REQUIRED TO COMPLETE ALL THE NECESSARY REQUIREMENTS PERTAINING TO TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE REQUESTS INCLUDING SUBMITTING A REQUEST AND ORDER FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT OXYGEN PUBLIC RELATIONS, LLC.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 8/7/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
